categories.name: Decor
categories.notes: Gift peaks Nov–Dec

categories.name: DnD & Gaming
categories.notes: Evergreen; passionate buyers; high repeat + bundle potential (tower+tray+vault); very low IP risk on original designs

categories.name: Desk & Office
categories.notes: Strong B2B angle (offices, co-working); low competition vs. search volume; Q4 spike + back-to-school Aug

categories.name: Personalized Gifts
categories.notes: Highest Etsy conversion rate; €6–14 premium over generic; evergreen; very high repeat buyer rate

categories.name: Tech Accessories
categories.notes: IP risk on any character-themed designs; Amazon undercuts plain designs below €10; pop-culture angle boosts revenue but risks ban

categories.name: Lighting & Lamps
categories.notes: Lithophanes convert well as gifts; high end lamps require brand trust + own website; strong Q4 peak

categories.name: Wedding & Events
categories.notes: Seasonal spike Mar–Sep; personalisation adds €8–15 premium; almost zero repeat buyers; Etsy dominant platform

categories.name: Miniatures & Terrain
categories.notes: Resin preferred for detail; FDM visible layer lines hurt premium perception; check IP on any character likenesses; high competition from resin sellers

categories.name: Jewelry & Wearables
categories.notes: Resin dominates; FDM layer lines hurt premium perception; REACH compliance required for skin-contact items; very saturated

categories.name: Planters & Garden
categories.notes: Generic round pots flop; unique animal or face designs win; drainage hole required for functional use; ships heavy

categories.name: Toys & Fidgets
categories.notes: Articulated dragons severely saturated (10k+ identical listings); EN71/ASTM F963 compliance required for toys sold to under-14s; avoid generic flexi animals

categories.name: Replacement Parts
categories.notes: Near-zero competition; high buyer urgency; price-tolerant; no gift angle; eBay sometimes outperforms Etsy for spec-search buyers; evergreen

categories.name: Pet Accessories
categories.notes: Strong personalisation premium; repeat buyer potential for multi-pet owners; photo of the pet in listing boosts conversion significantly

categories.name: Kids & Nursery
categories.notes: Toy safety compliance required (EN71 EU / ASTM F963 US) for items for under-14s; Q4 and baby shower peaks; personalisation (name) adds €5–10

categories.name: Home Organization
categories.notes: Amazon undercuts basic designs below €8; modular or custom-fit designs hold margin; functional need not a gift — low repeat buyers

categories.name: Cable Management
categories.notes: Amazon dominant below €8; only wins on Etsy with a design angle (wood-look, floating, aesthetic); primarily B2B or home office buyers

categories.name: Storage & Bins
categories.notes: Maker and workshop audience; Gridfinity system very popular — high search volume in maker community but low Etsy gift appeal

categories.name: Fashion Accessories
categories.notes: Very competitive; fast trend cycles; resin + UV-print finishes outperform plain FDM; strong TikTok/Instagram social commerce angle

categories.name: Tools & Workshop Jigs
categories.notes: Maker audience only; low gift potential; eBay often outperforms Etsy; niche but highly price-tolerant buyers

categories.name: Cosplay & Props
categories.notes: Trend-dependent on movie/game release cycles; strong community; high willingness to pay for quality; photography skill critical

categories.name: Keychains
categories.notes: Extremely saturated; only personalised or character-adjacent designs survive; very low filament cost (€0.50–€1.00/unit) means margin possible at volume

categories.name: Candle & Wax Accessories
categories.notes: Molds must be food/skin-safe — FDM PLA not food-safe; silicone casting from FDM master is the correct workflow; low competition

categories.name: Automotive & Bike
categories.notes: Functional need; spec-search buyer (eBay often better); near-zero gift angle; buyers are price-tolerant for right-fit parts

categories.name: Musical Instruments & Accessories
categories.notes: Passionate niche; very low competition; good personalisation angle; buyers appreciate maker story
